focus.title: 今日要览：4 个类目共 20 条更新
focus.body:
【AI 最新信息】What to watch for after Jensen Huang’s Japan visit
【金融新闻】手搓也能“很工业”
【中国新闻】最新：美军连续第九晚袭击伊朗
【世界新闻】Shakira, Madonna, Justin Bieber and BTS perform at colourful World Cup half-time show

items.title: What to watch for after Jensen Huang’s Japan visit
items.summary: Jensen Huang left Tokyo with deals spanning Japan's entire tech ecosystem.

items.title: Can an Apple lawsuit derail OpenAI’s hardware plans?
items.summary: On the latest episode of Equity, we debate whether Apple's lawsuit will cast over OpenAi's much-discussed plans to get into hardware and go public.

items.title: ‘Odyssey’ director Christopher Nolan calls AI an obvious ‘Trojan horse’
items.summary: "Everybody knows the Greeks are inside."

items.title: Nonprofit Current AI is racing to build the World Wide Web of AI, free for all
items.summary: Current AI, a non-profit building AI that leaves no one culture behind, has made remarkable progress across devices, AI chat and more.

items.title: Kimi: Threat or menace?
items.summary: Chinese company Moonshot AI released a new version of its Kimi model this week, prompting concern about "full AI communism."

items.title: 手搓也能“很工业”
items.summary: 手搓也能“很工业”(“融”观中国)

items.title: 推动异地互认、统一放宽离境期限 离境退税2.0版政策带来哪些变化？
items.summary: “我在广州购物享受了‘即买即退’，从福州离境还符合条件吗？”“境外旅客办理‘即买即退’后需要在多长时间内离境？”……随着中国入境消费从过去的旅游观光进入“深度体验”新阶段，境外旅客需求也更加细化。近日，商务部、财政部、国家税务总局等部门印发《关于加力优化离境退税措施扩大入境消费的通知》，许多人称之为“离境退税2.0版”

items.title: 这些新岗位，火了
items.summary: 244%！AI智能体人才需求爆发式上涨

items.title: 24小时不间断生产！“清凉生意”，太火爆
items.summary: 夏季天气炎热，降温解暑的需求大幅攀升。冷饮、制冰行业进入销售旺季。浙江宁波、福建厦门等地相关企业正加紧生产，全力保障市场供应。

items.title: The Tax Return You Filed in April Just Set Your 2027 Medicare Premium, and It’s Locked Unless Your Life Changes
items.summary: （该来源未提供摘要，请点击查看原文）

items.title: 最新：美军连续第九晚袭击伊朗
items.summary: 中新网7月20日电 美军中央司令部当地时间19日在社交媒体发布声明称，已于当天美国东部时间晚7时开始对伊朗实施新一轮打击，这是连续第九晚对伊发动袭击。

items.title: 伊朗革命卫队宣布袭击位于叙利亚的“敌方”指挥中心
items.summary: 中新网7月20日电 据法新社20日援引伊朗国家通讯社报道，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队宣布，已对位于叙利亚境内的一个“敌方”指挥中心发动袭击。

items.title: 乌克兰称俄罗斯袭击一土耳其货船致6人死亡
items.summary: 中新网7月20日电 据法新社20日报道，乌克兰当地时间19日表示，俄罗斯导弹袭击了一艘运载粮食的土耳其籍货船，造成6人死亡。数小时前，俄罗斯还对乌克兰首都基辅发动了新一轮导弹袭击。

items.title: 一名美军人员在伊拉克执行涉伊朗任务时死亡
items.summary: 中新网7月20日电 美军中央司令部19日在社交媒体上发布声明说，一名美军人员18日在伊拉克北部执行涉伊朗任务时死亡。

items.title: 今日上线！京沪高铁、京沪铁路可提前60天预约购票
items.summary: 今天(7月20日)，京沪高铁、京沪铁路试点新增火车票预约购票服务，旅客可预约开车前第60天至第17天的车票。旅客可通过铁路12306手机客户端“预约购票”专区，预约开车前第60天至第17天的车票。

items.title: Shakira, Madonna, Justin Bieber and BTS perform at colourful World Cup half-time show
items.summary: Robbie Williams and Jennifer Hudson also performed, with Kylie Jenner and Timothee Chalamet among the celebrities in the crowds.

items.title: Watch: Torrential rain hits New York and New Jersey triggering flash floods
items.summary: Water cascaded into subway stations and flooded streets, with people seen wading through water.

items.title: US soldier killed and one injured after Iranian attack in Iraq
items.summary: The US military reports another death a day after two of its soldiers were killed in Jordan.

items.title: Russia launches major ballistic missile attack on Ukrainian cities
items.summary: Eight people die and dozens are injured as several cities are hit by missile and drone attacks, while Kyiv continues its own assault on Russian infrastructure.

items.title: Ferry carrying 133 passengers and crew sinks off Guyana coast
items.summary: Fifteen children are among 67 people rescued, officials say, with dozens still missing.

items.summary: A new open-source format for interactive video on the web, with a built-in state machine, frame-accurate transitions, and packed-alpha transparency.
